2020May 3, 2020

Virtual

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Virtual, May 3, 2020 -- May 8, 2020

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-2020-05-virtual

21 Resolutions

1051Plenary
Request 9-month extension for ISO 10303-238 ed2
SC 4 requests the ISO TMB to grant a nine month extension for Edition 2 of AP238 to enable complete industry testing and validation of the model produced by the DIS ballot comment resolution during...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1050Plenary
Notify ISO CS of errors in ISO 10303-242 ed2
SC 4 instructs the Convenor of WG12 to coordinate a correction to the AP242 edition 2 with the project leader, and instructs its Committee Manager to notify ISO CS of the errors and seek guidance p...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1049Plenary
Request 9-month extension for ISO 10303-243 from ISO TMB
SC 4 requests the ISO TMB to grant a 9 month extension to ISO 10303-243 allowing the project team additional time to complete necessary coordination using virtual working arrangements dictated by r...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1048Plenary
Apply 24-month development track to ISO 10303-17
SC 4 requests its Committee Manager to apply the 24-month development track to the ISO 10303-17 project.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1047Plenary
Launch ISO 15926-4 ed.3 on 24-month track
SC 4 instructs its Committee Manager to launch edition 3 using the SDT 24 track and names Onno Paap as Project Leader and allocates the work to WG 3 with the following terms of reference: * Update ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1046Plenary
Organize meeting on digital handover for nuclear power plants
SC 4 requests SC 4 Chair and Committee Manager to organize a meeting with ISO/TC 184, ISO/TC 184/SC 4, ISO/TC 184/SC 4/AG 2, ISO/TC 184/SC 4/AHG 2, ISO/TC 85/SC 6, and ISO/TC 184/WG 6 chairs, commi...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1045Plenary
Create Task Force for SC 4 Reference Model for Industrial Data
SC 4 creates a Task Force titled "SC 4 Reference Model for Industrial Data" with the following term of reference to define and publish a reference model for SC 4 that builds upon the work of IDIOM,...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1044Plenary
Deprecate SC4N0535 and SC4N1290 as standing documents
SC 4 concurs with the recommendation to deprecate SC4N0535 and SC4N1290 as standing documents of SC 4 and instructs the PPC to update the SC 4 Handbook accordingly. Further, SC 4 instructs its Comm...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1043Plenary
Extend term of AHG 2 Nuclear Digital Ecosystem Specification
SC 4 extends the term for AHG 2 to the next meeting where a final report will be provided.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1042Plenary
Extend term of AHG 1 and request final report
SC 4 extends the term of the AHG 1 and requests its final report at the 80th Plenary meeting of SC 4. AHG 1 is requested to provide a plan for the further work itemized in the introduction to this ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1041Plenary
Appoint Dave Loffredo as WG 11 Convenor
SC 4 appoints Dave Loffredo as Convenor for WG 11 for a three-year term, with appreciation for his offer to serve in that capacity.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1040Plenary
Appoint Anne Dourgnon as WG 13 Deputy Convenor
SC 4 appoints Anne Dourgnon as the Deputy Convenor for WG 13 for a three-year term, with appreciation for her offer to serve in that capacity.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1039Plenary
Appoint Nils Sandsmark as WG 3 Deputy Convenor
SC 4 appoints Nils Sandsmark as the Deputy Convenor for WG 3 for a three-year term, with appreciation for his offer to serve in that capacity.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1038Plenary

ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
